name: Picarones Clásicos
description: Traditional Peruvian donuts made with sweet potato and pumpkin, deep-fried to a golden crisp and drizzled with rich fig syrup (miel de higos).

name: Picarones de Fresa
description: Extra-large picarones, perfect for sharing. Made with the same authentic recipe, generously bathed in our signature fig syrup.

name: Buñuelos Tradicionales
description: Light and airy fritters with a crispy exterior and soft center, dusted with powdered sugar and cinnamon. A true Peruvian classic.

name: Buñuelos con Manjar
description: Classic buñuelos filled with creamy Peruvian manjar blanco (dulce de leche). A heavenly combination of textures and flavors.

name: Combo Fiesta
description: The perfect mix for a celebration: 6 picarones clásicos + 4 buñuelos tradicionales + a jar of our homemade fig syrup.

name: Picarones Maracuyá
description: A seasonal twist on the classic: picarones with a passion fruit glaze that balances the sweetness with a tropical tartness.

name: Buñuelos de Queso
description: Savory meets sweet in these cheese-filled buñuelos. Peruvian fresh cheese inside, golden outside, dusted with a touch of cinnamon sugar.

name: Miel de Higos Artesanal
description: Our legendary fig syrup, slow-cooked with cinnamon, cloves, and orange peel. Available in a 250ml jar to enjoy at home.

name: Combo Familiar
description: Feeds the whole family: 12 picarones + 8 buñuelos + 2 jars of fig syrup. Ideal for birthdays, gatherings, or just a wonderful Sunday.

name: Picarones Integrales
description: A healthier version using whole wheat flour and reduced sugar. Just as flavorful, with added fiber and a nuttier depth of taste.

name: Buñuelos Navideños
description: A holiday special: buñuelos flavored with panettone spices, raisins, and a light icing sugar glaze. Limited edition during the holiday season.

name: Caja Regalo
description: A beautifully packaged gift box with an assortment of 8 picarones, 6 buñuelos, and a jar of miel de higos. Tied with a raffia bow.

name: Picarones Mini
description: Bite-sized picarones, perfect for tasting or as a party appetizer. 12 mini units with our homemade miel de higos for dipping.

name: Buñuelos de Guanábana
description: Exotic and unique: buñuelos infused with soursop (guanábana) pulp. A rare tropical flavor that surprises and delights every palate.

name: Combo Antojitos
description: Can't decide? Try a little of everything: 4 picarones clásicos, 3 buñuelos tradicionales, 1 buñuelo de manjar, and a small jar of miel de higos.
